title: Prashna Upanishad: Six Questions on the Nature of Reality
description: Six seekers each ask one question about the nature of reality — on creation, the vital breath, the mind, sleep, meditation, and the supreme person.
introduction: Six seekers each ask one question about the nature of reality — on creation, the vital breath, the mind, sleep, meditation, and the supreme person.

translation.text: From Prajapati are born life-breath and desire, and from desire the pairs of opposites.
